distribution: GameAnalysis lightweight repository excludes tools/ and does not auto-download third-party binaries.

tools.name: AssetRipper
tools.purpose: Unity project reconstruction and full local export from user-authorized game folders.

tools.name: UABEA
tools.purpose: Fallback Unity asset bundle inspection when AssetRipper or UnityPy cannot read a specific container.

tools.name: UnityPy
tools.purpose: Scripted extraction of readable Unity Sprite, Texture2D, TextAsset, AudioClip, and animation-frame data.

tools.name: repak
tools.purpose: Read-only Unreal .pak info/list/get workflows for user-authorized packaged games before any optional asset export.

tools.name: UEViewer / UModel
tools.purpose: Optional Unreal package viewer/exporter for small verified samples. Large commercial packages may require engine version parameters or time out; record failures.

tools.name: UndertaleModCli
tools.purpose: Automated local reading and exporter-script execution for user-authorized GameMaker data.win files.

tools.name: UndertaleModTool
tools.purpose: GUI cross-checker and source of bundled GameMaker Resource Exporters scripts such as ExportAllSprites, ExportAllTextures, ExportAllSounds, and ExportAllStringsJSON.

tools.name: ARM ASTC Encoder / astcenc
tools.purpose: Decode Cocos Creator and other mobile ASTC textures to local PNG previews for user-authorized study outputs. This local copy is the official windows-x64 release for x64 Windows; still record URL, version, license, SHA256, and -version/-help output in each current study-root.

tools.name: Electron gallery viewer template
tools.source: Local template generated from the verified Karma Exorcist gallery viewer workflow.
tools.purpose: Build a local Windows portable EXE that opens the generated HTML gallery and can reveal assets in Explorer.

tools.name: ILSpy / ilspycmd
tools.purpose: Check whether a Unity Assembly-CSharp.dll contains real managed IL method bodies or only dummy/stub signatures.

tools.name: Il2CppDumper
tools.purpose: Generate dump.cs, script.json, il2cpp.h, stringliteral.json, and DummyDll from GameAssembly.dll plus global-metadata.dat.

tools.name: Cpp2IL
tools.purpose: Optional IL2CPP analysis fallback. It may fail on newer metadata versions; record the failure instead of replacing Il2CppDumper.

tools.name: Ghidra
tools.purpose: Analyze GameAssembly.dll native code and apply Il2CppDumper mappings to inspect behavior relevant to art, animation, UI, VFX, camera, and audio.

tools.name: JDK
tools.purpose: Portable Java runtime used by bundled Ghidra without changing the system Java installation.

tools.name: IDA / IDA Free
tools.purpose: Optional manual cross-check for native code. IDA Free is not the default automated route because licensing and automation capabilities are limited.

boundary: These entries describe expected local paths and trusted sources for user-authorized learning workflows. The public repository may omit tools/; missing tools must be restored only with user permission, license checks, source URL, version, hash, and help/version output. Do not use them to distribute third-party original assets.
